welcome_back:
Welcome back! You have {count} topic(s).
Use the menu below to manage topics or schedules.
welcome_new:
👋 Welcome to Daily Photo Bot!

I'll send you beautiful photos on any topic you choose.

What topic would you like? (e.g., parrots, mountains, cars)
topic_added_with_schedule_hint:
✅ Great\! Topic *{name}* added\!

⏰ *Important:* Now set up a schedule using the *"⏰ Schedule"* button below to start receiving photos\. Without a schedule, no photos will be sent\!
first_photo_caption:
📸 *{name}*

Here's your first photo\! Set up a schedule to receive more\.
help_text:
📸 *Daily Photo Bot — Help*

*Commands:*
/start — Start the bot or return to main menu
/help — Show this help message
/version — Show bot version
/cancel — Cancel current action
/photo \- Get a random photo from your topics
/stop \- Stop all scheduled photo deliveries

*Menu options:*
➕ *Add topic* — Add a new photo topic
📋 *My Topics* — View, rename or delete topics
⏰ *Schedule* — Set up photo delivery schedule

*How it works:*
1\. Add a topic \(e\.g\., "parrots"\)
2\. Set a schedule \(interval or fixed time\)
3\. Receive beautiful photos automatically\!

💰 You get 1 free topic\. Additional topics require a one\-time payment\.
unknown_message: 🤔 I don't understand. Use the menu buttons below:
enter_new_topic: 📝 Type the name of your new topic (e.g., sunsets, puppies):
topic_limit_reached: ❌ You've reached the free topic limit. Please pay to add more.
topic_added: ✅ Topic *{name}* added\! Now set up a schedule for it\.
no_topics: You have no topics yet. Use "➕ Add topic" to create one!
enter_rename: ✏️ Enter the new name for this topic (1-50 characters, letters, numbers, spaces, hyphens):
rename_no_topic: ❌ Error: no topic selected for renaming.
no_topics_for_schedule: You don't have any topics yet! Add one first.
select_topic: 📋 Select a topic to configure its schedule:
schedule_type_prompt: ⏰ How do you want to receive photos?
select_interval: ⏱ Select how often you want to receive photos:
schedule_removed: ✅ Schedule removed\! You won't receive photos for this topic until you set a new schedule\.
menu_continue: Use the menu below to continue.
schedule_topic_error: ❌ Error: topic not found. Please try again.
schedule_interval_set: ✅ Schedule set\! You'll receive a photo every {interval}\.
schedule_fixed_set: ✅ Schedule set\! You'll receive a photo daily at {time}\.
payment_success:
✅ Payment received\! Thank you\!

Press ➕ Add topic to create your new topic\.
photo_no_topics: You don't have any topics yet. Use /start to add one!
photo_error: Sorry, couldn't fetch a photo right now. Please try again later.
stop_success: ✅ Stopped {count} schedule\(s\)\. You won't receive automatic photos until you set up a new schedule\.
stop_no_schedules: You don't have any active schedules to stop.
